settings.text:
Use this page as a guide for redeeming store vouchers, promo codes, and special offers.

How to redeem a voucher
1. Add eligible products to your cart.
2. Enter your voucher or promo code at checkout.
3. Confirm the discount before completing payment.

Voucher terms
Vouchers may be limited to selected products, order values, or promotional periods. Only one voucher may apply per order unless stated otherwise.
If your voucher is not working, contact us before placing the order so we can check the code and eligibility.
